item.description:
Meeting Coach 0.4.7

  • Record push-gate benchmark run for 226a67d
  • Record push-gate benchmark run for 226a67d
  • Skip push gate when outgoing commits touch only bench/history.jsonl
  • Record push-gate benchmark run for 34bb635
  • Hybrid coaching engine: deterministic detectors + per-signal LLM judges
  • Record push-gate benchmark runs; mark countable signals deterministic in rubric
  • Deterministic time-box trigger + rubric-aware prompt stance
  • Rubric + simulator fixes to run the 2026-07-14 leadership backtest
  • Fall back to a real generic rubric, not an empty one; fix stale rubric path
